description: A false-colour satellite image of the Pineiou Delta, a Natura 2000 site in Greece, acquired on 2011-08-23 by SPOT-5 at 2.5 m resolution, using a 1/2/3 Band Combination (likely Near-infrared, Red, Green). A prominent river, outlined in green, flows from the top-right towards the bottom-right, with its water appearing cyan/blue. To the left of the river, a large, irregularly shaped area of light grey/lavender tone, indicative of bare soil, mudflats, or sparsely vegetated land (potentially transformed salt marsh), is delineated by a yellow dotted line. Further to the left, the landscape is reddish-brown, representing vegetated areas, with visible patterns suggesting historical channels or landforms. To the right of the river, a distinct grid of rectangular agricultural fields is visible, with some parcels highlighted in a lighter cyan shade. The image source is CNES 2011©, Distribution Airbus DS/Spot Image.
